column2: Ah yes. Use when: Anyone says anything and you want to respond warmly.
Really? Use when: Someone says something interesting or surprising.
Amazing or wow. Use when: You see or hear something impressive.
OMG or whoa. Use when: You are shocked or amazed.
Oh my. Use when: You hear bad news or feel surprised.
I am fine, no thanks. Use when: Someone offers something you do not want.
I am not sure. Use when: You do not understand what someone said.
I do not know Korean well. Use when: Someone keeps talking Korean and you are lost.
Thank you. Use when: Anyone does something nice for you.
No no, not at all. Use when: Someone compliments you.
That's right. Use when: You agree with what someone said.
Yes, I understand. Use when: Someone explains something and you understand.
